narrative:
Blendon-E (precinct in Franklin County) has 934 registered voters, with 63.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.6 percentage points.
